name: Ice Cream Ribbon Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups softened ice cream, divided (including strawberry, blackberry, cherry, peach, etc.)
1 prepared crust made with vanilla, chocolate, or graham crumb
3 cups softened ice cream, divided (including vanilla and chocolate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one box of Junior Mints in the freezer.
2. Melt the remaining Junior Mints with butter: microwave for about 1 minute or stir over low heat until smooth.
3. Spread half of the 2 cups of softened ice cream evenly into the crust.
4. Drizzle with the melted Junior Mints.
5. Place the chilled pie in the freezer and let set for about 10 minutes, until chocolate is firm.
6. Chop the cold Junior Mints.
7. Stir the chopped Junior Mints into the remaining half of the softened ice cream (vanilla or chocolate flavor).
8. Spoon the mixture into the crust.
9. Loosely cover with plastic wrap and freeze several hours or overnight.
10. Garnish as desired.
